/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/ai_on_a_stick.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ai_on_a_stick.dir/src/config.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ai_on_a_stick.dir/src/database.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ai_on_a_stick.dir/src/hardware.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ai_on_a_stick.dir/src/http_server.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ai_on_a_stick.dir/src/llama_runtime.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ai_on_a_stick.dir/src/machine.cpp.o -o ai_on_a_stick  /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib/libsqlite3.tbd
